design_plan: Cinematic editorial landing with AIDA flow. Hero + sticky nav, followed by a dense CSS-grid bento explaining agent workflows. Serif-like grotesk headline (Cabinet Grotesk) paired with Satoshi body. Subtle GSAP scroll reveals guarded for CDN failure. Bento grid explicitly uses grid-auto-flow: dense and grid-auto-rows on large screens to avoid gaps. Motion kept tasteful and optional.
headline: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

site_brief.audience: real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling AI assistant
real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

summary: A conversion-focused niche landing page positioning Super as the sharper, cheaper-for-repeat-work personal AI agent for real estate agents. Super operates real apps, automates follow-ups, listings, and scheduling, and reuses a computer-use cache—grounded in current reporting on computer-use AI agents and workflow automation.
